coupon_lots: Each purchased ceramic and plating lot; retain witnesses
objective: Verify cavity-up chamfer, 1-20 shelf-to-same-castellation continuity, neighbor/ring isolation, dimensions, finish and ceramic integrity before consuming dies
precondition: Spectrum drawing revision and lot certificate recorded
thermal_vacuum_exposure: None; incoming at controlled room condition
contact_resistance: Four-wire continuity for every shelf/castellation; insulation to neighbors and seal ring
microscopy: 100 percent optical inspection of chamfer, shelf, castellations, cracks, chips, contamination and finish
cleaning_outgassing: Supplier packaging review; approved UHV clean before bonding
service_handling: Fixture only by ceramic datum; do not grip castellations
acceptance_limit: Drawing tolerances and one-to-one net identity must pass; ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE for project insulation and magnetic limits
basis: Spectrum PB-CA8272-B plus signed incoming inspection plan
required_record: Incoming inspection sheet, continuity matrix, photos, CoC and disposition

coupon_lots: Each adhesive lot, mix batch and cure batch; same die/substrate materials
objective: Establish bondline, cure, position, contamination, adhesion and hot stability of actual stack
precondition: Lot, ratio, mass, bondline control, cure profile and post-cure logged
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Unaged controls plus approved 250 deg C vacuum dwell/ramp/cycle matrix; duration from signed duty envelope
pull_shear: Die shear on designated witnesses before and after exposure
contact_resistance: Leakage/isolation through and around attach measured at room and hot condition where feasible
microscopy: Bondline cross-sections, voids, fillet/wicking, die shift, cracking and residue
cleaning_outgassing: ASTM E595 evidence recorded but not used as life proof; process blanks and chamber witness included
service_handling: No harness; thermal fixture duplicates cartridge support
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: no die shift/crack/contamination and statistically justified retained shear versus same-lot controls
basis: EPO-TEK TDS, NASA E595 method limitation and project continuous-life requirement
required_record: Material traveler, cure trace, chamber trace, shear data, microscopy and contamination report

coupon_lots: Minimum two independent LCC/wire process lots plus same-lot unaged controls
objective: Select wedge tool, wire alloy/diameter, force, ultrasonic power, time, substrate temperature, loop and landing window
precondition: P(q) sign-off simulated; actual die-pad and LCC finish documented
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Initial characterization; no aging for process-window selection
pull_shear: Destructive pull per frozen MIL-STD-883 Method 2011 revision on designated wires; record force and fracture mode
contact_resistance: Four-wire end-to-end path resistance for each bondable terminal
microscopy: First/second bond foot, heel, loop, pad damage, cratering, contamination and fracture surfaces
cleaning_outgassing: Approved clean materials and handling; no flux
service_handling: Fixture loads only ceramic; no pull on live harness
acceptance_limit: MIL method/workmanship floor where applicable plus ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE process-capability and lower-confidence-bound criteria
basis: DLA MIL-STD-883 Method 2011 and same-process control distribution
required_record: Bonder recipe, tool/wire lot, raw pull data, fracture classification, images and selected window

coupon_lots: Same selected recipe across independent lots with unaged controls
objective: Demonstrate continuous-250-deg-C vacuum resistance and strength retention
precondition: Q10-03 window frozen; actual material stack identical to intended unit
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Approved 250 deg C continuous dwell plus ramps/cycles and vacuum level; interim checkpoints from signed duty envelope
pull_shear: Pull designated witnesses at each checkpoint; preserve some for cross-section
contact_resistance: Measure cold/hot four-wire path resistance continuously or at defined checkpoints
microscopy: Heel/intermetallic/cavity/lift/crack cross-sections and fracture mode after exposure
cleaning_outgassing: Chamber blank/witness and residual contamination inspection
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: no opens/intermittency and statistically justified resistance/strength/fracture-mode retention relative to controls
basis: Johannessen 250C aging precedent, NASA degradation caution and project duty envelope
required_record: Chamber log, raw resistance-temperature-time data, pull distributions, cross-sections and signed life assessment

article: Fanout microtransition: LCC castellation to tongue lane
coupon_lots: Each LCC finish lot, tongue metallization lot and Al wire/ribbon lot; unaged controls
objective: Qualify short redundant Al wedge/ribbon transition without lifting LCC metallization
precondition: No-Ni bondable tongue finish declaration; geometry supported in cartridge fixture
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Unaged plus same approved 250 deg C vacuum dwell/ramp/cycle matrix
pull_shear: Pull/shear fixture isolates and records each parallel element and the combined net without loading ceramic incorrectly
contact_resistance: Four-wire resistance of each element where separable and combined lane at room/hot conditions
microscopy: Bond feet, heel, tongue/LCC metallization, ceramic damage, intermetallic/cavity and residue
cleaning_outgassing: Supplier chemistry and approved cleaning; chamber blank/witness
service_handling: Harness load applied only after separate comb is engaged
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: each net survives with no lift/crack/intermittency and justified aged resistance/strength versus controls; parallel wires are electrical redundancy only
basis: Johannessen Al-to-thin-Au evidence, MIL pull framework and project no-load-through-joint rule
required_record: Metallization CoC, recipe, per-element data, images, chamber trace and disposition

article: Runner-up direct resistance/parallel-gap welded tab to LCC castellation
coupon_lots: Sacrificial LCC lots and each tab/plating/conductor lot
objective: Determine whether direct tab welding damages thin Au metallization or ceramic
precondition: Weld equipment capability and plating DOE defined; never use a real sensor first
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Unaged plus approved 250 deg C vacuum aging if initial coupons survive
pull_shear: Tab peel/pull/shear with fixture-defined load direction; record substrate damage
contact_resistance: Four-wire weld resistance during thermal and mechanical challenge
microscopy: Cross-section weld nugget, Au finish, metallization lift, ceramic microcrack and heat-affected zone
cleaning_outgassing: No flux; approved solvent/ultrasonic limits and chamber witness
service_handling: Flex conductor only downstream of engaged strain clamp
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: no ceramic/metallization damage and statistically justified weld strength/resistance after aging
basis: microJoining stranded-wire and plating-process guidance; no exact castellation qualification exists
required_record: DOE matrix, current/force/time traces, cross-sections, pull/resistance data and go/no-go decision

article: Robust tongue terminal to KAP301-class pigtail
coupon_lots: Each terminal alloy/plating lot, conductor lot and weld/crimp tool setup
objective: Qualify supported resistance weld or exact-contact crimp away from LCC
precondition: Exact conductor gauge/strand/plating and terminal/contact specification recorded
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Unaged plus approved 250 deg C vacuum dwell/ramp/cycle matrix
pull_shear: Pull test in wire axis and off-axis service direction on witnesses; crimp cross-section where applicable
contact_resistance: Four-wire joint resistance at room/hot condition and during flex challenge
microscopy: Weld/crimp cross-section, strand damage, plating displacement, cracks and residue
cleaning_outgassing: No flux; approved cleaning and outgassing declarations
service_handling: Comb engaged before flex/proof-load; record load path
acceptance_limit: Supplier/standard criterion where exact plus ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE aged resistance, pull and proof-load limits
basis: NASA-STD-8739.4 workmanship framework, microJoining process guidance and Allectra wire rating
required_record: Tool calibration, weld trace or crimp height, cross-sections, pull/resistance and material records

coupon_lots: Each exact alloy, temper, finish and machining lot; same-lot controls
objective: Qualify reusable contact as a possible future baseline
precondition: Vendor UHV, magnetic, cleaning, force and geometry declarations received
thermal_vacuum_exposure: 250 deg C vacuum dwell under representative deflection plus thermal cycles and service-mate cycles
pull_shear: Normal-force/relaxation measurement and retention/withdrawal force; no load applied through LCC metallization beyond approved window
contact_resistance: Four-wire contact resistance continuously or at defined hot/cold checkpoints; monitor micro-motion
microscopy: Contact scar, fretting, oxide/transfer, plating wear, spring set, LCC castellation damage
cleaning_outgassing: Approved UHV clean; outgassing screen for complete contact assembly
service_handling: Independent cartridge clamp and harness comb engaged
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: retained force/contact resistance/service cycles/magnetic field and no LCC damage; exact vendor limits incorporated if obtained
basis: Deringer-Ney 250C contact capability and stress-relaxation guidance; no exact UHV LCC socket source found
required_record: Vendor declarations, force-time-temperature data, resistance trace, cycle log, microscopy and magnetic report

coupon_lots: At least independent assembly lots after component coupons pass
objective: Demonstrate integrated die/LCC/tongue/guard/comb function and absence of shorts or contact
precondition: Q10-02 through Q10-07 released for selected path; P(q) traveler signed
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Approved continuous 250 deg C UHV life profile with ramp/cycles; instrument cartridge and chamber witness
pull_shear: Witness bonds/joints tested after exposure; live cartridge not destructively tested unless designated
contact_resistance: All four end-to-end paths and isolation monitored cold/hot; raw phase and recombined injected-signal test before/during/after
microscopy: Guard clearance/witness marks, loop contact, cracks, wire rub, terminal movement, residue and cross-section of sacrificial twin
cleaning_outgassing: Final clean traveler; chamber blank/witness; pressure/outgassing acceptance from vacuum owner
service_handling: Harness proof load and flex applied through feedthrough support/comb/cartridge structure while monitoring
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: no short/open/intermittency, no joint-load witness, and all approved electrical/mechanical/vacuum limits pass
basis: Project continuous-duty envelope and released component coupon evidence
required_record: Serialized traveler, full chamber/electrical traces, photos, proof-load/flex log and release board minutes

coupon_lots: Each production-intent cartridge geometry; multiple operators
objective: Verify independent removal, protection, keyed reconnection and no disturbance to other axes
precondition: Complete cartridge passed Q10-09; service procedure and tools frozen
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Room-condition service cycles plus selected hot/cold cycles only if safe; post-service thermal-vacuum confirmation
pull_shear: No destructive test on service unit; witness contact/joint tests after cycle campaign
contact_resistance: Continuity and isolation monitored through every mate; raw phase identity test after each reinstall
microscopy: Inspect LCC edge, guard, pigtail, terminals, clamp surfaces, tool marks and neighboring cartridges
cleaning_outgassing: Clean-tool and particle-control records before reinstallation
service_handling: Time, access, torque/force and accidental-load events recorded
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: target service-cycle count, zero channel swap, no damage/particle release and electrical drift within released limits
basis: User reuse requirement and stage-30 maintenance procedure
required_record: Operator checklist, cycle count, photographs, resistance/identity history and anomaly log

coupon_lots: Material/process blanks plus representative assembled coupons
objective: Separate material outgassing/residue from electrical and thermal failures
precondition: All solvents, flux prohibition, gloves, fixtures and bake history recorded
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Approved vacuum screen and continuous hot exposure; collector/chamber witnesses positioned near article
contact_resistance: Surface insulation/leakage before/after cleaning and exposure
microscopy: UV/visible inspection and residue analysis appropriate to suspected chemistry
cleaning_outgassing: ASTM E595 values retained as screening only; project pressure/outgassing rate and contamination limits supplied by vacuum owner
service_handling: No unapproved handling after final clean
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: complete assembly meets signed UHV pressure/outgassing/contamination criteria; no visible or analytical residue
basis: NASA E595 method limits, manufacturer cleaning instructions and HSX vacuum requirements
required_record: Chemical lot log, clean traveler, blank/witness results, chamber trace and vacuum-owner sign-off

coupon_lots: Each delivered lot of terminal, tab, contact, fastener, plating and conductor
objective: Prevent nickel/steel or unexpectedly magnetic cold-worked/coated material near Hall die
precondition: Exact alloy, temper, coating and underplate declarations received
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Measure before and after thermal/vacuum exposure if metallurgy may change
contact_resistance: Not applicable except continuity of intended shields
microscopy: Inspect material identity and coating stack; retain samples
service_handling: Measure complete cartridge in assembled geometry and at sensor datum
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: field/gradient or permeability remains below signed Hall-error budget at all axes
basis: Accu-Glass Ni-Fe pin disclosure, Spectrum no-Ni LCC finish and project magnetic budget
required_record: CoC, instrument calibration, sample geometry, raw magnetic data, calculation and sign-off

coupon_lots: Complete four-lane tongue/pigtail stack plus material-junction references
objective: Quantify gradient-induced EMF, lane mismatch and spinning residual
precondition: Exact alloys and junction locations documented; zero-field fixture verified
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Controlled uniform temperature and imposed gradient profiles through approved range including 250 deg C in vacuum where feasible
contact_resistance: Measure each lane voltage/resistance and raw/recombined board output versus temperature/gradient/polarity
microscopy: Post-test inspection for movement or degradation
service_handling: No mechanical load during thermal EMF characterization
acceptance_limit: ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE: residual zero-field error and drift below signed magnetic-measurement uncertainty allocation
basis: Deringer-Ney alloy thermal-EMF warning, four-terminal spinning architecture and project error budget
required_record: Temperature map, junction map, raw phase data, polarity reversals, fitted coefficients and uncertainty

article: End-to-end terminal identity and short-circuit test
coupon_lots: Every serialized cartridge and every installation on X/Y/Z axes
objective: Prevent mirrored map, channel swap, neighbor short, seal-ring short or shared return
precondition: Signed P(q) traveler and feedthrough/board pin map available
thermal_vacuum_exposure: Pre-power at room condition; repeat after thermal-vacuum/service events
contact_resistance: Four-wire terminal-to-J1/feedthrough continuity, all-pairs isolation, guard/ring isolation, flex monitoring and injected differential signal
microscopy: Visual compare to signed top-view and exit drawings
cleaning_outgassing: Final-clean status verified before vessel installation
service_handling: Wiggle only at approved harness test point with strain relief engaged
acceptance_limit: No misidentification/open/short; resistance/isolation must meet released project limits; any provisional numeric limit is ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE
basis: Authoritative board J1 map, stage-20 pin map and signed stage-10 orientation traveler
required_record: Serialized continuity matrix, operator/verifier signatures, injected-signal polarity result and installation photo
